zh.lifeSummary: 當Rey Sancho VI de Navarra於1132年4月21日出生在西班牙納法洛亞時，他的父親García Ramírez King of Navarre32歲，母親Margarete de L'Aigle32歲。他和Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他在西班牙納法洛亞被列為king of spain。他去世於1194年6月27日在西班牙納法洛亞潘普洛納享年62歲，埋葬在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rey Sancho VI de Navarra于1132年4月21日出生在西班牙納法洛亞时，他的父亲García Ramírez King of Navarre32岁，母亲Margarete de L'Aigle32岁。他和Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他在西班牙納法洛亞被列为king of spain。他去世于1194年6月27日在西班牙納法洛亞潘普洛納享年62岁，埋葬在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Navarra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Edgardo, Guido, Santo, Vito, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonio, Benedicto, Camillo, Dante, Emilio, Fausto, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Mario, Romulo, Sergio.  Spanish Agustin, Herlinda, Manuel, Solita.

Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from Navarre (Castilian Navarra, Basque Nafarroa, French Navarre), a largely Basque-speaking region now divided between Spain and France, but in the Middle Ages an independent Basque kingdom. The name of the region derives from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’. Compare Navarre .

variants.name: Navarrete
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Pedro, Raul, Luis, Miguel, Roberto, Salvador, Francisco.

Spanish: habitational name from any of the places in La Rioja, Aragon, and the Basque Country named in Castilian Navarrete and in Basque Nafarrate (the latter in Araba/Álava province), of Basque origin (compare   Navarra   and   Nafarrate  ).
Basque: Castilianized form of Nafarrate or Nafarrete, cognates of 1.

variants.name: Navarro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Ramon, Francisco, Miguel, Rafael, Jorge, Pedro.
Spanish, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name for someone from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

variants.name: Nava
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Carlos, Luis, Pedro, Manuel, Alfredo, Francisco, Ruben, Javier, Enrique.

Spanish, Catalan, and Asturian-Leonese: habitational name from any of numerous places called Nava, named with nava ‘treeless plateau’, a word of pre-Roman origin, most probably from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’ (see Navarra ).

variants.name: Navarre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Jacques, Anatole, Angelle, Camille, Marcelle.
French: habitational name from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

nameMeanings.name: Sancho
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin, perhaps from Latin sanctus ‘holy’. It will always be associated with Sancho Panza , Don Quixote's companion.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Rey Sancho VI de Navarra was born on 21 April 1132, in Nafarroa, Spain, his father, García Ramírez King of Navarre, was 32 and his mother, Margarete de L'Aigle, was 32. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon. His occupation is listed as king of spain in Nafarroa, Spain. He died on 27 June 1194, in Pamplona, Nafarroa, Spain, at the age of 62, and was buried in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rey Sancho VI de Navarra est né le 21 avril 1132, à Nafarroa, Espagne, son père, García Ramírez King of Navarre, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margarete de L'Aigle, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon. Sa profession de son indiquée est king of spain à Nafarroa, Espagne. Il est décédé le 27 juin 1194, à Pamplona, Nafarroa, Espagne, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rey Sancho VI de Navarra am 21. April 1132 in Nafarroa, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater García Ramírez King of Navarre 32 und seine Mutter Margarete de L'Aigle 32. Er hatte mit Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als king of spain in Nafarroa, Spanien aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. Juni 1194 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Pamplona, Nafarroa, Spanien und wurde in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Sancho VI de Navarra è nato il il 21 aprile 1132 nel Nafarroa, Spagna, il suo padre, García Ramírez King of Navarre, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margarete de L'Aigle, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon. La sua occupazione è indicata come king of spain nel Nafarroa, Spagna. Morì il 27 giugno 1194, nel Pamplona, Nafarroa, Spagna, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Rey Sancho VI de Navarraが1132年4月21日にスペインナファロアで生まれた時，父García Ramírez King of Navarreは32歳，母Margarete de L'Aigleは32歳であった。彼はPrincesa Sancha De Castilla y Leonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。スペインナファロアでの職業はking of spainと記録されている。彼は1194年6月27日にスペインナファロアプアンプロナで62歳で死去し，スペインナファロアイルnアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rey Sancho VI de Navarra(이)가 1132년 4월 21일 스페인 나파로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 García Ramírez King of Navarre(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margarete de L'Aigle(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 스페인 나파로에서 king of spain이었다. 그는 1194년 6월 27일 스페인 나파로 파플론아에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 나파로 이루n아에 묻혔다.

mn.21 April 1132–27 June 1194: 1132 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 21–1194 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 27

pt.21 April 1132–27 June 1194: 21 de abril de 1132–27 de junho de 1194
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Sancho VI de Navarra nasceu em 21 de abril de 1132, em Nafarroa, Espanha, seu pai, García Ramírez King of Navarre, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margarete de L'Aigle, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon. Sua profissão aparece como king of spain em Nafarroa, Espanha. Ele faleceu em 27 de junho de 1194, em Pamplona, Nafarroa, Espanha, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rey Sancho VI de Navarra родился 21 апреля 1132 г. в местности нафарроа, Испания, его отцу по имени García Ramírez King of Navarre было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margarete de L'Aigle, 32. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon.  Он работал по профессии king of spain в местности нафарроа, Испания. Он умер 27 июня 1194 г. в местности памплона, нафарроа, Испания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания.

es.21 April 1132–27 June 1194: 21 de abril de 1132–27 de junio de 1194
es.Lorca, Valle de Yerri, Navarra, España: Lorca, Valle de Yerri, Navarra, España
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rey Sancho VI de Navarra nació el 21 de abril de 1132, en Navarra, España, su papá, García Ramírez King of Navarre, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margarete de L'Aigle, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon. Su ocupación registrada era king of spain en Navarra, España. Murió el 27 de junio de 1194, en Pamplona, Navarra, España, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Pamplona, Navarra, España.
